title: Fix conftest.py Bug: Missing Function Call Parentheses
problem: is_wealthbox_adapter_enabled referenced as variable instead of called as function(). Wealthbox adapter tests never ignored regardless of config.
approach: Change to if not is_wealthbox_adapter_enabled(): Add unit test validating adapter-enabled checks.

title: Upgrade Python from 3.9 to 3.11/3.12
problem: Python 3.9 reached EOL. No security patches, missing performance improvements, can't use modern language features.
approach: Update .python-version, Pipfile, Dockerfile. Run test suite. Adopt Python 3.11+ features. Target 3.12.

title: Hardcoded Secret Key in Base Settings
problem: SECRET_KEY hardcoded in base.py. Critical security vulnerability. DEBUG defaults to True exposing stack traces.
approach: Move SECRET_KEY to env var with django-environ. Add startup check. Change DEBUG default to False.

title: Replace Raw psycopg2 SQL with Django ORM
problem: analytical/views.py uses raw psycopg2 connections. Fragile, hard to test, bypasses Django connection pooling.
approach: Replace with Django connections. Create shared query_utils.py. Break easy_button/views.py into separate modules.

title: Add Structured API Versioning and OpenAPI Schema Validation
problem: Single v1 namespace. URL patterns mix re_path with path inconsistently. Swagger uses AllowAny.
approach: Add /api/v2/ namespace. Standardize path() usage. Add proper permission classes. Add API versioning strategy.

title: Add Rate Limiting to Public Endpoints
problem: No rate limiting on public endpoints. Easy button and analytical endpoints vulnerable to abuse.
approach: Add django-ratelimit. Configure limits per endpoint. Add Redis-backed rate limiting for production.

title: Implement Comprehensive Test Suite
problem: Test coverage unknown. Critical paths need coverage.
approach: Add pytest with coverage. Write tests for critical paths. Add CI pipeline with coverage requirements.

title: Add Monitoring and Observability
problem: No APM or tracing. Hard to debug production issues.
approach: Add Sentry for error tracking. Add OpenTelemetry. Add latency histograms.

title: Refactor Massive easy_button/views.py (1544 lines)
problem: 1544-line view file. Unmaintainable, hard to test, merge conflicts.
approach: Split into domain modules: easy_button/views/dashboard.py, easy_button/views/territory.py, etc.

title: Add Database Indexes for Query Performance
problem: No visible indexes on frequently queried columns. Slow queries.
approach: Add indexes on frequently filtered columns. Analyze slow queries. Add Django migrations for indexes.
